description: Style NoteCarry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,   these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil. Product DetailsBrown textured leather wallet with three-foldsHas one main compartmentHas six card slots, five insert pockets, one id card holder and a buttoned pocket on the right sideHas a brand tag on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 12 cm x 9 cm
